## Jobs Discovered

What jobs did we uncover in this conversation?

> **When** [situation they described], **they want to** [what they're trying to do], **so they can** [outcome they're seeking].

### Struggling Moments

What triggered them to look for a solution?

> **Trigger 1:** [Describe a specific moment of frustration or failure they shared]

### Forces Observed

| Force | Type | Quote/Evidence |
|-------|------|----------------|
| [e.g., "Current setup is slow"] | Push toward | "We're spending 2 hours a day waiting" |
| [e.g., "Migration is scary"] | Push away (anxiety) | "We've been burned by migrations before" |
| [e.g., "Team wants modern tooling"] | Pull toward | "Engineers keep asking for better DX" |
| [e.g., "Familiar with current tool"] | Habit | "We know Jenkins, even if it's painful" |
